title: Acro's Mirrorstones
description: A modfest 1.17 entry focusing on teleportation and alchemy
body:
A modfest 1.17 entry focusing on teleportation and alchemy

To start progression in the mod find an alchemical pillar in the world and interact with it, you should be given a book


you can also find the pillars with /locate mirrorstones:mirrorstone


these pillars can teleport you to roughly there opposite coordinates and provide buffs
